summary.en: IEC 61851-1 defines general EV supply equipment requirements, including operating characteristics, the EVSE-to-vehicle connection, and electrical-safety requirements for EVSE. Chile projects that specify IEC-based EVSE should check charging mode, control pilot, protective measures, marking, manuals, and installation interface against IEC 61851 rather than relying only on China GB/T 18487 files.
summary.zh: IEC 61851-1规定电动汽车供电设备的一般要求，包括运行特性、EVSE与车辆连接以及EVSE电气安全要求。采用IEC路线的智利项目应按IEC 61851核查充电模式、控制导引、保护措施、标识、说明书和安装接口，而不应仅依赖中国GB/T 18487资料。
summary.zht: IEC 61851-1規定電動汽車供電設備的一般要求，包括運行特性、EVSE與車輛連接以及EVSE電氣安全要求。採用IEC路線的智利項目應按IEC 61851核查充電模式、控制導引、保護措施、標識、說明書和安裝接口，而不應僅依賴中國GB/T 18487資料。

summary.en: China's common baseline is GB/T 18487 for conductive charging systems. It is directionally related to IEC 61851 but is not a substitute for an IEC 61851 design review requested by a Chilean customer, installer, certification body, or project owner.
summary.zh: 中国常用基线为GB/T 18487传导充电系统。该系列与IEC 61851方向相关，但不能替代智利客户、安装方、认证机构或项目业主要求的IEC 61851设计审查。
summary.zht: 中國常用基線為GB/T 18487傳導充電系統。該系列與IEC 61851方向相關，但不能替代智利客戶、安裝方、認證機構或項目業主要求的IEC 61851設計審查。

gap.en: Map the charger by charging mode, AC/DC rating, protective earthing, control-pilot behavior, proximity function, automatic reclosing, adapter restrictions, marking, and installation instructions. Any China-only test report should be translated into an IEC clause matrix before Chile review.
gap.zh: 应按充电模式、交流/直流额定值、保护接地、控制导引行为、接近功能、自动重合闸、适配器限制、标识和安装说明进行映射。任何仅按中国标准出具的测试报告，均应转换为IEC条款矩阵后再提交智利审查。
gap.zht: 應按充電模式、交流/直流額定值、保護接地、控制導引行為、接近功能、自動重合閘、適配器限制、標識和安裝說明進行映射。任何僅按中國標準出具的測試報告，均應轉換為IEC條款矩陣後再提交智利審查。

mandatory_status.target: Not automatically mandatory as a standalone product certificate unless incorporated by contract, SEC protocol, installation rule, utility requirement, or project specification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 use is common for Chinese EV charging-system design and testing; legal mandatory status depends on Chinese catalogue and project context

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851 as a design and evidence-mapping baseline for Chile-facing EVSE unless a Chile instrument or customer specification makes it expressly required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向智利的EVSE宜将IEC 61851作为设计和证据映射基线；只有在智利文件或客户规范明确引用时，才按明确要求处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向智利的EVSE宜將IEC 61851作為設計和證據映射基線；只有在智利文件或客戶規範明確引用時，才按明確要求處理。
